ingredients_text: Whole Grain Oats, Corn Starch, Sugar, Salt, Tripotassium Phosphate. Vitamin E (mixed tocopherols) (Added to Preserve Freshness). Vitamins and Minerals [Calcium Carbonate, Iron (mineral), Zinc (mineral), Vitamin C (sodium ascorbate), niacinamide, Vitamin B6 (pyridoxine hydrochloride), Vitamin A (palmitate), Vitamin B1 (thiamin mononitrate), folic acid, Vitamin B12, Vitamin D3].
